case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LUMUS, EDUARDO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUMUS, EDUARDO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,538.04 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LUMUS, EDUARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUMUS, EDUARDO THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BARS THE ACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
